description: An interactive WebGL 3D visualization platform containing over 1,700 projects in the Ethereum ecosystem space. Users can browse the universe of projects categorized across multiple dynamic orbits.
requirements: Application MUST maintain 60FPS using InstancedMesh arrays.
Hovering an orb MUST instantly show details without clicking.
Silk mode MUST use High-fidelity `#F0F2F9` contrast palettes.
